slices.focus: Storm anxiety: building guardrails not white-knuckling
slices.summary: Faced a Gulf tropical threat with a real shift in approach. Kept reflux routine steady, limited forecast checking to set windows, and delegated a meeting to Miguel early. Still edgy, but anxiety felt contained instead of endless. Planning a short storm-week checklist to share with Lena and Miguel.
open_loops: Write the storm-week checklist with 5 items and an evening replacement activity
Share the storm plan with Lena and Miguel before next threat
Formalize a nighttime phone cutoff with a replacement routine
decisions: Maintained reflux medication and meal timing despite storm stress
Limited forecast checking to set windows instead of compulsive monitoring
Delegated a public meeting to Miguel early instead of taking full load
